sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports pain in his wrist and hand, particularly with gripping. He also reports numbness in his fingers. The patient states he has been wearing a splint as instructed.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Reflexes are 1+ and symmetric bilaterally. Toe downgoing bilaterally is noted. Blood pressure is 110/70 mmHg. Heart rate is 72 bpm.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient's symptoms are concerning for carpal tunnel syndrome and cubital tunnel syndrome. Differential includes cervical radiculopathy.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: A referral to an orthopedist may be considered. A follow-up visit will be scheduled. The patient should continue wearing splints.
